tasks.name: check_emails
tasks.code:
import sys
import os
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(os.getcwd(), ".agents", "skills", "zirseaz", "skills_repo"))
try:
    import email_responder
    email_responder.check_emails_and_draft_responses()
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error en tarea de email: {e}")
tasks.description: Revisa correos no leídos y genera borradores.
